category_sources: Official SourceForge project page describes ebook tools as tools for accessing and converting various ebook file formats.
source_facts.description says it provides access and conversion for several ebook formats.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project page title is "ebook tools".
docs_sources: Official SourceForge files page provides release/source archive access.
Official SourceForge project page is the best available project documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page exposes a Code tab for the project source-control area.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge project page lists command-line UI and programming languages C, Perl, and Python.
source_facts.description identifies ebook access and conversion.
